chunks.text: Page | 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-92 of 2026. Cr. Bail Application No.S-353 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 13.04.2026. Mr. Tahir Nisar Rajput, Advocate for Applicant/accused in Cr. Bail Application No.92 of 2026. Mr. Mashooque Ali Mahar, Advocate for Applicant/accused in Cr. Bail Application No.S-353/26. Mr. Altaf Hussain Khokhar, Deputy P.G for the State. ***************************************** After hearing at length, both learned counsel for the applicant/accused in above mentioned both Bail Applications submit that they do not press the instant Bail Applications, if the directions are issued to the learned Trial Court to conclude the Trial within a reasonable time. In view of above, both these listed Bail Applications are disposed of alongwith pending application(s), if any, with directions to Trial Court to conclude the evidence within two months. In case of failure, the applicants/accused shall be at liberty to file a fresh Bail Application(s), if they desire so. JUDGE Ali.
